p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 4 pass_to_pass tests from repo CI/CD. CI commands discovered: npm run lint:ts (ESLint, ~56s), npm run lint:style (Stylelint, ~62s), npm run lint:circular:main (dpdm circular deps, ~1s), npx vitest run src/components (unit tests, ~18s). All tests verified to pass on base commit. Skipped: typecheck (~115s, borderline), full test suite (>60s), package tests (require bun). Tests added: test_repo_eslint_passes, test_repo_stylelint_passes, test_repo_no_circular_deps, test_repo_component_tests_pass.
